document.source_title: PBKS vs MI Playing 11, IPL 2026 Today Match: Mumbai captain Hardik Pandya’s status up in air vs Punjab

claims.claim_text: Hardik Pandya's status for the match is uncertain due to muscle spasms.
claims.evidence_text: the MI skipper has missed two back to back matches for muscle spams and there’s still a question mark on if he’ll be playing the match.

claims.claim_text: Lockie Ferguson's fitness is uncertain for the match.
claims.evidence_text: the Kiwi bowler’s status is still up in the air and it’ll be interesting to see if he gets fit on time.

entities.name: Hardik Pandya
entities.description: Captain of Mumbai Indians, uncertain for the match due to muscle spasms.
entities.evidence_text: the MI skipper has missed two back to back matches for muscle spams and there’s still a question mark on if he’ll be playing the match.

entities.name: Lockie Ferguson
entities.description: Bowler for Punjab Kings, fitness uncertain for the match.
entities.evidence_text: the Kiwi bowler’s status is still up in the air and it’ll be interesting to see if he gets fit on time.

entities.name: Suryakumar Yadav
entities.description: Will captain Mumbai Indians if Hardik Pandya is unable to play.
entities.evidence_text: In case, he does not make it, Suryakumar Yadav will be taking the captain’s mantle like he has been doing in the past couple of matches.

entities.name: Shreyas Iyer
entities.evidence_text: Shreyas Iyer-led side will want to strengthen that unit.
